data.description_suggestion: Deactivates an active contract by its ID, preventing further transactions under that contract. Requires the contract ID as a path parameter. Returns the updated contract object with deactivated status. This operation is irreversible and will immediately stop all payment processing for the specified contract. Requires appropriate authentication and authorization.
data.reasoning: The operation has no description and the summary lacks specificity. Added details about: what the operation does (deactivates contracts), required inputs (contract ID), expected output (updated contract object), side effects (stops payment processing, irreversible), and authentication requirements. data.current_description: Initializes a payment via hosted payment page redirect.
data.description_suggestion: Initializes a payment order for hosted payment page (HPP) processing. Accepts order details including amount, currency, and customer information via HppOrderRequest. Returns a PaymentSession object containing the HPP redirect URL and session identifier. The order is created in pending state and transitions to authorized/captured upon successful payment completion.

Added specificity about what the operation accepts, returns, and how it affects order state for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'refundOperation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description was completely empty. Added essential details about operation prerequisites (captured payment), required inputs (operationId, refund details), return value (Operation object), and state transitions. Included constraints (partial refunds, captured-only) critical for AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Processes a refund for a captured payment operation. Requires the operationId of the payment to refund and refund amount/details in the request body. Returns an Operation object representing the refund transaction. The original payment operation transitions to refunded state, and funds are returned to the customer's payment method. Partial refunds are supported. Refunds can only be processed on captured or settled payments.
data.reasoning: Description was completely empty. Added essential details about operation prerequisites (captured payment), required inputs (operationId, refund details), return value (Operation object), and state transitions. Included constraints (partial refunds, captured-only) critical for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'captureOperation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description was empty. Added context about operation prerequisites (authorized payment), required inputs, return value, and critical state transitions. Included timing constraints and settlement implications essential for AI agents to understand payment flow.

data.description_suggestion: Captures a previously authorized payment operation, completing the payment transaction. Requires the operationId of the authorized payment and capture details in the request body. Returns an Operation object representing the capture transaction. The original payment operation transitions from authorized to captured state, and funds are settled. Capture must occur within the authorization validity period (typically 7-30 days depending on card scheme).
data.reasoning: Description was empty. Added context about operation prerequisites (authorized payment), required inputs, return value, and critical state transitions. Included timing constraints and settlement implications essential for AI agents to understand payment flow.

message: Operation 'cancelOperation' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description was empty. Added critical details about operation prerequisites (pending/authorized only), required inputs, return value, and state transitions. Included important constraint distinguishing cancellation from refund to prevent AI agent misuse.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels a pending or authorized payment operation, preventing further processing. Requires the operationId of the operation to cancel and cancellation details in the request body. Returns an Operation object representing the cancellation. The original operation transitions to cancelled state and no funds are charged. Cancellations can only be performed on pending or authorized operations; captured payments must be refunded instead.
data.reasoning: Description was empty. Added critical details about operation prerequisites (pending/authorized only), required inputs, return value, and state transitions. Included important constraint distinguishing cancellation from refund to prevent AI agent misuse.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels an active pay-by-link payment request, preventing further payment attempts through that link. Returns the updated PaymentSession object with cancelled status. data.description_suggestion: Processes a refund for a captured payment operation. Requires the operationId of the payment to refund and refund amount/details in the request body. Returns an Operation object representing the refund transaction. The original payment operation transitions to refunded state, and funds are returned to the customer's payment method. Partial refunds are supported. Refunds can only be processed on captured or settled payments.

data.description_suggestion: Captures a previously authorized payment operation, completing the payment transaction. Requires the operationId of the authorized payment and capture details in the request body. Returns an Operation object representing the capture transaction. The original payment operation transitions from authorized to captured state, and funds are settled. Capture must occur within the authorization validity period (typically 7-30 days depending on card scheme).
data.reasoning: Description was empty. Added context about operation prerequisites (authorized payment), required inputs, return value, and critical state transitions. Included timing constraints and settlement implications essential for AI agents to understand payment flow.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels a pending or authorized payment operation, preventing further processing. Requires the operationId of the operation to cancel and cancellation details in the request body. Returns an Operation object representing the cancellation. The original operation transitions to cancelled state and no funds are charged. Cancellations can only be performed on pending or authorized operations; captured payments must be refunded instead.
